positive: A stylized, mystical forest scene at twilight. Focus on interconnected, abstract elements: glowing bioluminescent flora, intricate root systems forming patterns, and gentle, stylized animal silhouettes (deer, foxes) emerging from the mist. The composition must be symmetrical and centrally framed, utilizing clean, deep color gradients of sapphire blue, emerald green, and soft violet. The style should evoke Art Nouveau and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock prints, rendered with strong contrast and flat color areas for print-on-demand appeal. Emphasize negative space and strong visual symmetry. Graphic novel quality, vector art feel.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, graffiti, signature, bad anatomy, messy, dirty, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, photographic, photorealistic
